Justification: The primary function is blending ingredients for single-serving beverages. The motor shall have a minimum power output of 300W and operate at a speed of at least 20,000 RPM (no load) to effectively process a range of ingredients, including frozen fruits and ice.; The blending efficiency will be measured by the ability to achieve a smooth consistency (defined as <5% of particles larger than 2mm) within 45 seconds when blending a standard mix of 100g frozen berries, 50g spinach, and 200ml water at high speed.; The blender shall offer at least two variable speed settings (low: 10,000-15,000 RPM, high: 15,000-20,000 RPM) and a pulse function (activated by holding a button for 1-2 seconds) to provide granular control over the blending process.; The blending jar geometry shall be optimized to ensure all ingredients are directed towards the blade vortex, minimizing ingredient adherence to jar walls and maximizing blending uniformity.

The overall weight of the blender, including the battery, shall not exceed 1 kg to ensure comfortable and effortless portability.; The base shall be designed with a minimum footprint diameter of 80mm and a maximum overall height of 250mm to fit within standard backpack side pockets and car cup holders.; The stability of the base shall be such that it resists tipping when subjected to a lateral force of 5N applied at a height of 100mm from the surface, on a level plane.; An integrated, ergonomic carrying handle or strap, capable of supporting the product's weight, shall be incorporated into the design.

The rechargeable lithium-ion battery shall provide a minimum of 12 full blending cycles (defined as 30 seconds blending at high speed with the standard ingredient mix) on a single charge.; Charging shall be facilitated via a USB-C port, supporting USB Power Delivery (USB PD) up to 30W for a full charge in under 2 hours.; A clear, multi-stage LED indicator shall display battery status: Green (75-100%), Yellow (25-75%), Red (0-25%), and flashing Red when charging is required.; The battery management system shall incorporate overcharge, over-discharge, and short-circuit protection.

The blending jar shall be constructed from BPA-free Tritan, capable of withstanding a drop from 1 meter onto a concrete surface without cracking or shattering.; The motor housing shall be made from impact-resistant ABS plastic, exhibiting a minimum Izod impact strength of 20 kJ/m².; The blades shall be fabricated from food-grade SUS420 stainless steel, with a minimum Rockwell hardness of HRC 50 to ensure longevity and effective cutting performance over the product's lifespan.; All materials in contact with food shall be certified food-grade and demonstrate resistance to staining from common agents like turmeric and coffee after 24 hours of exposure, with a color change rating of no more than 2 on the Gray Scale.

The blending jar, lid, and blade assembly shall be designed to be top-rack dishwasher safe, maintaining material integrity, clarity, and functionality after a minimum of 50 dishwasher cycles.; The motor base shall achieve an Ingress Protection (IP) rating of IPX4, providing protection against splashing water from any direction.; The blade assembly shall be detachable from the jar using a tool-less mechanism, requiring no more than 5 seconds for removal and reattachment.

A safety interlock mechanism shall prevent motor activation unless the blending jar is correctly and securely twisted onto the motor base. The interlock shall require a minimum torque of 0.5 Nm to disengage accidentally.; The blade assembly shall be fully enclosed within the blending jar when the lid is secured, preventing accidental contact during operation and handling.; The motor shall incorporate thermal overload protection, automatically shutting off if internal temperatures exceed 100°C and requiring a 15-minute cool-down period before re-operation.

The ABS plastic housing shall incorporate a minimum of 30% post-consumer recycled content, while remaining compliant with all performance and safety requirements.; The battery shall be rated for a minimum of 500 full charge-discharge cycles before its capacity degrades below 80% of its original capacity. The battery compartment shall be designed for user-replaceable access with minimal tools (e.g., a single Phillips head screw).; The energy efficiency shall be optimized such that the standby power consumption is less than 0.1W, and the energy consumed per blending cycle (30 seconds at high speed) is less than 15 Wh.; The product shall be designed for disassembly, with a target of no more than 5 unique fastener types and an average disassembly time of under 5 minutes for end-of-life recycling.

The overall aesthetic shall be clean, minimalist, and modern, drawing inspiration from successful designs in the premium kitchen appliance and personal electronics sectors. A palette of 3-4 sophisticated color options (e.g., matte black, slate gray, rose gold) shall be offered.; The blending jar shall have a maximum grip diameter of 75mm, and the lid shall have a diameter of 80mm, both featuring a textured, non-slip surface for secure handling, even with wet hands.; The control interface shall consist of a single, multi-function button with distinct press durations (short press for pulse, long press for continuous blending) to ensure intuitive operation.

The blending jar shall have a total volume of 550ml, with a maximum usable blending capacity of 500ml to accommodate ingredient expansion and prevent overflow.; Volume markings shall be clearly embossed or printed on the exterior of the jar at intervals of 50ml, with an accuracy tolerance of +/- 5ml.

The operational noise level shall not exceed 75 dB(A) when measured at a distance of 1 meter from the unit during a standard blending cycle.; The design shall incorporate vibration dampening measures within the motor housing to minimize perceived noise and enhance user comfort.

The blending time target of 30-60 seconds is confirmed. Testing shall use a standardized mix: 100g frozen banana slices, 50g kale, 10g chia seeds, and 200ml almond milk.; Ice crushing capability will be tested by blending 5 standard ice cubes (approx. 20g each) with 50ml of water for 30 seconds, resulting in uniformly crushed ice particles with no whole cubes remaining.; The charging time target of under 2 hours is confirmed when using a standard USB PD 30W charger connected to the USB-C port.

The target ex-factory cost shall be no more than $35 USD, enabling a retail price point between $50 and $100 USD.; Key component cost targets include: Motor Assembly (<$10), Battery Pack (<$8), Housing & Jar (<$7), Electronics & PCB (<$5), Blades & Seals (<$3), Packaging (<$2).

The battery shall be user-replaceable with a single Phillips head screwdriver, with clear instructions provided in the user manual and online video tutorials.; Consumable parts, specifically the blade assembly and the sealing gasket, shall be designated as user-replaceable and available for purchase online. The blade assembly shall be rated for a minimum lifespan of 500 blending cycles.; The user manual shall provide detailed instructions for daily cleaning, basic maintenance (e.g., checking seals), and troubleshooting common issues, alongside links to online support resources.
